channel.title: Journalism on Marginalia
channel.description: Recent content in Journalism on Marginalia

item.title: Executive Summary
item.description: Taylor Lorenz is a prominent American technology-culture journalist whose reporting on internet culture, influencers, and online trends has both elevated her profile and embroiled her in heated controversies. This report chronicles Lorenz’s career from 2010 to the present, emphasizing contentious episodes that raise questions about journalistic norms such as doxxing (revealing personal identities), participatory reporting (when journalists become part of the story), and perceived ethical breaches. Key findings include:

item.title: Taylor Lorenz: Controversy and Media Ethics (Annotated Bibliography)
item.description:
Taylor Lorenz: Controversy and Media Ethics (Annotated Bibliography) Link to heading

Taylor Lorenz is a prominent American technology-culture journalist whose reporting on internet culture, influencers, and online trends has both elevated her profile and embroiled her in heated controversies. This report chronicles Lorenz’s career from 2010 to the present, emphasizing contentious episodes that raise questions about journalistic norms such as doxxing (revealing personal identities), participatory reporting (when journalists become part of the story), and perceived ethical breaches. Key findings include:
